mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_account_serial t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.member_account_id like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.memberAccountId},'%')
AND t.money like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.money},'%')
AND t.type like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.type},'%')
AND t.category like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.category},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.status},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM member_account_serial t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.member_account_id like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.memberAccountId},'%')
AND t.money like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.money},'%')
AND t.type like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.type},'%')
AND t.category like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.category},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberAccountSerialEntity.status},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_account_serial t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
